{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}
<% if (it.descriptionText) { %>
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|description}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasModifiers) { %>
== Modifiers ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|modifiers}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasVariants) { %>
== Variants ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|variants}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasNameModifiers) { %>
== Name Modifiers ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|name_modifiers}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
